arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) identifying your DynamoDB table.

attribute.description: Attributes used in the DynamoDB table including name and type.

billing_mode.description: The billing mode for the DynamoDB table, such as 'PROVISIONED' or 'PAY_PER_REQUEST'.

deletion_protection_enabled.description: Whether deletion protection is enabled for the DynamoDB table.

global_secondary_index.description: Global secondary indexes for the table, including key attributes and capacities.

hash_key.description: The primary key attribute used to uniquely identify items in the table.

id.description: The unique ID of the DynamoDB table.

local_secondary_index.description: Local secondary indexes for the table, including key attributes.

point_in_time_recovery.description: Point-in-time recovery settings for the table, indicating if it's enabled.

range_key.description: The range key attribute used to define the sort order within a partition.

read_capacity.description: The read capacity units configured for the table.

replica.description: Replica configurations for the table, including region and KMS key.

stream_arn.description: The ARN of the stream associated with the DynamoDB table.

stream_enabled.description: Indicates if DynamoDB Streams are enabled for the table.

stream_label.description: A timestamp, in ISO 8601 format, associated with the stream.

stream_view_type.description: The type of data view provided by the stream.

table_class.description: The class of the table, such as 'STANDARD' or 'STANDARD_INFREQUENT_ACCESS'.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the DynamoDB table.

ttl.description: Time to live settings for the table, including the attribute name and enabled status.

write_capacity.description: The write capacity units configured for the table.
